flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Copper Mountain Community College are 21% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($33.3k vs $42.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Copper Mountain Community College rose 60% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $13.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Copper Mountain Community College fell 41% between 2006 and 2009 (62.0% → 36.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Copper Mountain Community College fell 37% between 2006 and 2009 (27.3% → 17.3%).
